summary: Iteration 3 — SkillSphere Phase 3 testing of Piston/coding hybrid, Forum module (threads + replies + votes + accept + pin + lock), AI Quiz Gen (GPT-5.2 fallback chain), browser-title/favicon, ErrorBoundary, and Made-with-Emergent removal. Backend: 20 new pytest tests in /app/backend/tests/test_phase3.py — ALL 20 PASS (100%) in 13.83s. Combined with prior iterations: 58 + 20 = 78/78 backend tests green. Frontend: end-to-end verified login → /forum (4 threads, pinned-first ordering, filters/sort UI) → ThreadDetail (reply form posts, vote button works) → AI Quiz Gen page (trainer-only nav link confirmed; student does NOT see 'AI Quiz' link). AI generation via 'From custom text' produced two valid MCQ questions in ~10–15s with correct option highlighted in emerald (4 emerald-styled elements detected). Browser tab title is 'SkillSphere — Learn. Build. Get hired.' and 'Made with Emergent' badge is NOT in DOM. Backend startup logs confirmed: 'RESEND_API_KEY not set — placeholder mode', 'Object storage ready', 'Piston probe: enabled=False'.
critical_code_review_comments: ai_quiz.py reads EMERGENT_LLM_KEY at module-import time via os.environ['EMERGENT_LLM_KEY'] (line 15) — this will hard-crash backend boot if the key is ever removed. Recommend: use os.environ.get('EMERGENT_LLM_KEY') and raise a clean 503 inside generate_quiz if missing.

forum.py vote_thread/vote_reply read+modify in two non-atomic steps (find + update) — under concurrent voting from same user, both clicks may pass the 'not in voters' check and double-increment. Use $addToSet/$pull with conditional $inc, or move to a single update_one with array filter.

coding.py PISTON_ENABLED is module-level mutable global set by probe_piston() at startup. If the Piston container goes down mid-run, execute() will still attempt _run_piston (per-call probe is not done). Consider a small TTL re-probe (e.g., every 60s) or fallback-on-error already present (good).

ai_quiz.py _extract_json uses non-greedy `\[.*?\]` for the fenced match but greedy `\[.*\]` in fallback — if LLM emits two arrays the fallback grabs from first '[' to last ']' which can break parsing. Worked in our test but is fragile.

ai_quiz.py persists AI quiz with `trainer_id` but does NOT enforce that course belongs to this trainer when course_id is provided — any trainer can generate+save a quiz against any course. Recommend ownership check before save.
forum.py: vote_thread returns optimistic `upvotes: t['upvotes'] ± 1` from in-memory copy rather than the value after the $inc — fine but could drift on race. Minor.
forum.py delete_thread cleans replies but does NOT clean associated notifications referencing that thread — orphaned notifications will dangle (low impact, just clicking them 404s).

frontend/src/pages/AIQuizGenerator.jsx renders correct answer with class containing 'emerald' AND visible word 'correct' next to the option — for students if they ever see this preview accidentally it would leak the answer. Confirmed: route is /ai-quiz which is trainer-only via Layout nav AND backend require_role enforces 403 (verified).
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_phase3.py (new — 20 pytest cases covering coding hybrid+Piston probe, forum CRUD/votes/accept/pin/lock/delete with role checks, AI quiz generate with course+source_text + student-403 + missing-input-400 + quiz_id persistence + correct_index hidden on student GET)

success_rate.frontend: 100% on Phase 3 surfaces tested (title/favicon/no-badge, /forum list+detail+reply+vote, /ai-quiz trainer-only nav + custom-text generation rendering emerald-highlighted correct options)

test_credentials: From /app/memory/test_credentials.md — all seeded accounts work. Token stored in localStorage as 'skl_token'.
seed_data_creation: test_phase3.py creates a few TEST_PH3 threads (cleaned up in teardown by admin DELETE), a couple of replies under those threads, and 1 AI-generated quiz (saved=true) which remains in db.quizzes with title 'AI Quiz: <course title>'. Manual playwright run also added one reply 'Testing reply via Playwright!' / 'TEST_PH3_UI auto reply from playwright' on the pinned welcome thread.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 is fully green. Backend has 78 total pytest cases across /app/backend/tests/{backend_test.py,test_phase2.py,test_phase3.py}. Useful selectors: navbar 'AI Quiz' link present ONLY for trainer/admin; on /ai-quiz, switching SOURCE to 'From custom text' reveals a textarea; the QUESTIONS input is type=number; generated correct options render with className containing 'emerald' plus a small 'correct' badge. Forum vote button has data-testid containing 'vote'. AI generation can take 3–15s; pad timeouts to 30s on tests. The /api/auth/login response uses key 'access_token' (the test helper handles both). Piston intentionally disabled in dev — Java/C++/etc still return 400 from /api/coding/run. Watch out: ai_quiz.py crashes on import if EMERGENT_LLM_KEY env var is removed (see code-review comment #1).
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 25 review-request line items passed: GET /api/coding/languages (local-only), /api/coding/_probe (piston_enabled=false), POST /api/coding/run python OK + java 400, forum create/list/sort/filter/vote/reply/lock-403/accept/pin/delete with role checks, AI quiz course+source_text generation with quiz persisted to db.quizzes and correct_index hidden on student GET /api/quizzes/{id}, student-403 on /api/ai-quiz/generate, missing-input-400, browser title + no Made-with-Emergent + favicon.svg loaded, /forum 4+ threads with detail/reply/vote, trainer /ai-quiz nav link + generation + emerald-highlighted correct option, backend startup logs (Resend placeholder, Object storage ready, Piston probe=false).
